note: Back-translations (TartuNLP <locale>->en) for QA review of fuzzy-flagged .po entries written by tools/translate_po.py. Where a back-translation diverges materially from the English msgid, a native speaker should review the .po entry directly (it carries the #, fuzzy flag) rather than editing this file.
engine: TartuNLP / Neurotõlge, University of Tartu — https://api.tartunlp.ai/translation/v2

et_back.Your sandbox is a separate database tena: Your sandbox is a separate database tenant — the same insulation is obtained by a paying customer, enforced by Postgres line-level security, not by a UI filter.
et_back.Paste any other demo's contact ID and tr: Paste any other demo contact ID and try to read it with your session.
et_back.The row does not exist for you. That is: The line is not there for you. This is Postgres line-level security, not a hidden filter.
et_back.Unexpected: the row was visible. Isolati: Unexpected: The line was visible. The isolation should have concealed it — please report it.
et_back.Read the isolation policy source: Read the source of isolation policy
et_back.The Estonian standard chart of accounts: The standard chart of Estonian accounts is applied automatically when the company is created.

ru_back.Your sandbox is a separate database tena: Your sandbox, a separate tenant of the database, is the same isolation that the paying client receives from the post-Greek security service, not the UI filter.
ru_back.Paste any other demo's contact ID and tr: Place any other demo pass and try to read it at your session.
ru_back.The row does not exist for you. That is: That line doesn't exist for you. It's the Post-Greek level security, not a hidden filter.
ru_back.Unexpected: the row was visible. Isolati: Suddenly, the line was visible. The isolation was supposed to hide it — please report it.
ru_back.The request returned an unexpected statu: The request has returned to unexpected status.
ru_back.Read the isolation policy source: Read the source of the isolation policy.
ru_back.The Estonian standard chart of accounts: The Estonian standard chart of accounts is applied automatically in the establishment of the company.
